chk_match_agreements_pairing_when_double.name: chk_match_agreements_pairing_when_doubles
chk_match_agreements_pairing_when_double.value: ("match_agreements"."format" = 'doubles' AND "match_agreements"."pairing_kind" IS NOT NULL) OR ("match_agreements"."format" = 'singles' AND "match_agreements"."pairing_kind" IS NULL)

chk_match_agreements_cancel_xor_result.name: chk_match_agreements_cancel_xor_result
chk_match_agreements_cancel_xor_result.value: "match_agreements"."cancelled_at" IS NULL OR ("match_agreements"."result_recorded_at" IS NULL AND "match_agreements"."reversed_at" IS NULL)

chk_match_bet_debts_status_consistency.name: chk_match_bet_debts_status_consistency
chk_match_bet_debts_status_consistency.value:
("match_bet_debts"."status" = 'settled' AND "match_bet_debts"."settled_at" IS NOT NULL AND "match_bet_debts"."voided_at" IS NULL)
       OR ("match_bet_debts"."status" = 'voided' AND "match_bet_debts"."voided_at" IS NOT NULL AND "match_bet_debts"."settled_at" IS NULL)
       OR ("match_bet_debts"."status" = 'pending' AND "match_bet_debts"."settled_at" IS NULL AND "match_bet_debts"."voided_at" IS NULL)
